title: Mentaiko Pilaf with Russian Twist
description: A flavorful pilaf dish infused with the rich taste of mentaiko and a hint of Russian spices.
instructions: Heat butter and olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add pilaf rice and cook, stirring constantly, for 2-3 minutes.
Add dried dill weed, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add mentaiko and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the skillet. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes or until the liquid is absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork. Stir in chopped parsley.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
